title: bauhinia macrantha
intro: Bauhinia macrantha, a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, is also known as the "large-flowered orchid tree" due to its vibrant and showy flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, thanks to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Bauhinia macrantha include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder for medicinal use, and can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements.
